title: Matera CRO Featured In Fintech Futures Video
excerpt: At Fintech Meetup 2024, FinTech Futures sat down with Brad Goad, Chief Revenue Officer at Matera, to discuss how banks need to modernize their core infrastruct
body:
At Fintech Meetup 2024, FinTech Futures sat down with Brad Goad, Chief Revenue Officer at Matera, to discuss how banks need to modernize their core infrastructure to keep up with innovations in instant payments.

Watch the full video on [FinTech Futures](https://www.fintechfutures.com/2024/04/video-matera-at-fintech-meetup-2024-core-banking-modernisation-and-instant-payments/).
